parameters.content:
## WS-02 Existing Post Resolver

Receives a `request_id`, loads the draft campaign request, and resolves the existing-post identifiers.

### Supported now
- Instagram canonical URLs: `instagram.com/p/...`, `instagram.com/reel/...`
  - Uses Meta Instagram oEmbed to obtain `media_id`
- Facebook canonical URLs:
  - `/posts/{post_id}`
  - `/videos/{video_id}`
  - `/reel/{reel_id}`
  - Builds `object_story_id` when possible

### Output
Resolver data is merged into `campaign_creation_requests.request_payload`:
- `resolver_status`
- `resolved_at`
- `source_post_id`
- `object_story_id`
- `instagram_media_id`
- `resolver_method`

This workflow does not publish or create ads.
